name: Notify BH - Job Offer Pending Approval
script:
# Get BH users with Branch Head role bh_users = frappe.get_all( "Has Role", filters={"role": "Branch Head", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"] ) bh_emails = [] for u in bh_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: bh_emails.append(email) if bh_emails: applicant_name = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, "applicant_name" ) form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=bh_emails, subject="Job Offer Approval Required - " + (applicant_name or doc.job_applicant), message=( "

Dear Branch Head,

" "

A Job Offer requires your approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Candidate" + (applicant_name or "") + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Proposed CTC" + str(doc.custom_proposed_ctc or "") + "
Joining Date" + str(doc.custom_tentative_joining_date or "") + "
Budget Code" + (doc.custom_budget_code or "") + "
" "

" "Review & Approve

" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) frappe.msgprint( "Approval request sent to Branch Head!", indicator="green", title="Email Sent" )

name: Notify HR - Job Offer Approved by BH
script:
# Auto submit when BH approves if doc.workflow_state == "Approved by BH": frappe.db.set_value("Job Offer", doc.name, "docstatus", 1) frappe.db.commit() applicant_name = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, "applicant_name" ) hr_users = frappe.get_all( "Has Role", filters={"role": "HR User", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"] ) hr_emails = [] for u in hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: hr_emails.append(email) if hr_emails: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=hr_emails, subject="Job Offer Approved - " + (applicant_name or doc.job_applicant), message=( "

Dear HR Team,

" "

The Job Offer for " + (applicant_name or "") + " has been Approved by the Branch Head.

" "

Please proceed with sending the offer letter to the candidate.

" "

View Job Offer

" "

Regards,
System

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Send Pre-Offer Form - Interview Cleared
script:
job_applicant_data = frappe.db.get_value( "Job Applicant", doc.job_applicant, ["applicant_name", "email_id", "phone_number"], as_dict=True ) if doc.status == "Cleared" and job_applicant_data and job_applicant_data.email_id: # ✅ NO import — use frappe directly base_url = frappe.utils.get_url() # ✅ IMPORTANT: open SAME record (no duplicate) form_url = base_url + "/candidate-pre-offer?name=" + doc.job_applicant subject = "Congratulations! Please Fill Your Pre-Offer Form - Aionion Capital" message = ( "

Dear " + (job_applicant_data.applicant_name or "Candidate") + ",

" "

Congratulations! You have successfully cleared the interview at Aionion Capital.

" "

Please fill in the Pre-Offer Form with your details and upload all required documents.

" "

" "" "Click Here to Fill Pre-Offer Form

" "

Documents Required:

" "
    " "
  • Aadhar Card
    • " "
  • PAN Card
    • " "
  • Bank Passbook / Cancelled Cheque
    • " "
  • 10th Marksheet
    • " "
  • 12th Marksheet
    • " "
  • Semester Marksheet
    • " "
  • Degree Certificate
    • " "
  • Experience Certificate (if applicable)
    • " "
  • Last Salary Slip (if applicable)
    • " "
  • Resume / CV
    • " "
" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ) frappe.sendmail( recipients=[job_applicant_data.email_id], subject=subject, message=message, reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, ) frappe.msgprint( "Pre-Offer Form link sent to " + (job_applicant_data.applicant_name or ""), indicator="green", title="Email Sent!" )

name: Merge Pre-Offer Form to Job Applicant
script:
# Find existing record (excluding current)
existing = None

if doc.email_id:
    existing = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Job Applicant",
        {"email_id": doc.email_id, "name": ["!=", doc.name]},
        "name"
    )

if not existing and doc.phone_number:
    existing = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Job Applicant",
        {"phone_number": doc.phone_number, "name": ["!=", doc.name]},
        "name"
    )

# If found → merge and delete duplicate
if existing:
    existing_doc = frappe.get_doc("Job Applicant", existing)

    fields_to_merge = [
        "custom_father_spouse_name",
        "custom_permanent_address",
        "custom_current_address",
        "custom_aadhar_number",
        "custom_pan_number",
        "custom_bank_account_number",
        "custom_bank_name",
        "custom_ifsc_code",
        "custom_current_employer",
        "custom_current_designation",
        "custom_current_ctc",
        "custom_expected_ctc",
        "custom_notice_period",
        "custom_last_working_day",
        "custom_aadhar_upload",
        "custom_pan_upload",
        "custom_10th_marksheet",
        "custom_12th_marksheet",
        "custom_sem_marksheet",
        "custom_degree_certificate",
        "custom_experience_certificate",
        "custom_last_salary_slip",
        "custom_bank_passbook",
        "custom_other_documents",
        "custom_declaration_agreement",
        "resume_attachment",
    ]

    # Merge values
    for field in fields_to_merge:
        value = doc.get(field)
        if value:
            existing_doc.set(field, value)

    existing_doc.flags.ignore_permissions = True
    existing_doc.save()

    # 🔥 Delete duplicate record
    frappe.delete_doc("Job Applicant", doc.name, force=True)

    frappe.msgprint(
        f"Data merged into existing applicant: {existing}",
        indicator="green"
    )

name: Notify BH and HR - Job Requisition Submitted
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Pending BH Approval": # Get all BH emails bh_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Business Head", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in bh_users + hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Job Requisition Pending Approval - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

A new Job Requisition has been submitted and requires your approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Hiring Location" + (doc.custom_hiring_location or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
Proposed Salary" + (doc.custom_proposed_salary or "") + "
" "

Review & Approve

" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Notify Final Approver - Job Requisition BH Approved
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Pending Final Approval": fa_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Final Approver", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) director_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Director", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in fa_users + director_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Job Requisition - BH Approved - Final Approval Required - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

A Job Requisition has been approved by Business Head and requires Final Approval.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
Proposed Salary" + (doc.custom_proposed_salary or "") + "
" "

Review & Final Approve

" "

Regards,
HR Team
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

if doc.workflow_state == "Approved": hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) director_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Director", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hr_users + director_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Job Requisition APPROVED - Start Recruitment - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear HR Team,

" "

The following Job Requisition has been Fully Approved. Please start the recruitment process.

" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "

Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
No of Positions" + str(doc.no_of_positions or "") + "
Hiring Location" + (doc.custom_hiring_location or "") + "
Urgency Level" + (doc.custom_urgency_level or "") + "
Proposed Salary" + (doc.custom_proposed_salary or "") + "
" "

View Requisition

" "

Regards,
System
Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )

name: Notify Hiring Manager - Job Requisition Rejected
script:
if doc.workflow_state == "Rejected": hm_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "Hiring Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) hr_users = frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"role": "HR Manager", "parenttype": "User"}, fields=["parent"]) recipients = [] for u in hm_users + hr_users: email = frappe.db.get_value("User", u.parent, "email") if email: recipients.append(email) if recipients: form_url = frappe.utils.get_url_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name) frappe.sendmail( recipients=list(set(recipients)), subject="Job Requisition REJECTED - " + (doc.designation or doc.name), message=( "

Dear Team,

" "

The following Job Requisition has been Rejected.

" "" "" "" "" "
Requisition" + doc.name + "
Designation" + (doc.designation or "") + "
Department" + (doc.department or "") + "
" "

Regards,

Aionion Capital

" ), reference_doctype=doc.doctype, reference_name=doc.name, )
